about.title: About PACTA
about.description: PACTA is a local-first Contract Lifecycle Management system built for teams that need full control over their contract data. No cloud dependencies, no third-party databases — just a single binary that runs on your machine.
about.mission: Our mission is to make contract management accessible, secure, and completely under your control.

localFirst.title: Local-First
localFirst.description: Your data stays on your machine. No cloud sync, no external dependencies.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Transparent code, community-driven improvements, auditable security.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: One binary, zero infrastructure. Deploy in minutes, not days.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about PACTA

items.question: What is PACTA?
items.answer: PACTA is a Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) system that runs locally on your machine. It helps you create, track, approve, and manage contracts without relying on any cloud services.

items.question: Do I need an internet connection?
items.answer: No. PACTA runs entirely on your local machine. Once installed, it works offline with no external dependencies.

items.question: How is my data stored?
items.answer: All data is stored in an embedded SQLite database within the application. No external database server is required.

items.question: Is PACTA free?
items.answer: Yes. PACTA is open source and free to use under the MIT License.

items.question: How do I install PACTA?
items.answer: Download the binary for your platform from the Download page, extract it, and run the executable. No installation wizard needed.

items.question: Who is PACTA for?
items.answer: Legal teams, procurement departments, consulting firms, and any organization that needs to manage contracts without cloud dependency.
